name: trace-cue
description: Local-first visual evidence and review CLI for humans and AI agents.

scripts.test: node --test --test-concurrency=2 tests/architecture.test.js tests/cli.test.js tests/agentic-human-review.test.js tests/ci-proof-import.test.js tests/control-center.test.js tests/control-center-agentic-review.test.js tests/control-center-api-client.test.js tests/control-center-ai-connections.test.js tests/control-center-ai-setup.test.js tests/control-center-goal-completion.test.js tests/control-center-media-review.test.js tests/dashboard-settings-store.test.js tests/development-workflow.test.js tests/document-sync.test.js tests/git-sync.test.js tests/media-review-contracts.test.js tests/media-prepared-audio.test.js tests/package-artifact.test.js tests/playwright-test.test.js tests/verification-ci.test.js tests/verification-evidence.test.js tests/verification-orchestration.test.js
scripts.test:contracts: node --test --test-concurrency=2 tests/ci-proof-import.test.js tests/development-workflow.test.js tests/document-sync.test.js tests/git-sync.test.js tests/package-artifact.test.js tests/verification-ci.test.js tests/verification-evidence.test.js tests/verification-orchestration.test.js
scripts.test:runtime: node --test --test-concurrency=2 tests/architecture.test.js tests/cli.test.js tests/agentic-human-review.test.js tests/control-center.test.js tests/control-center-agentic-review.test.js tests/control-center-api-client.test.js tests/control-center-ai-connections.test.js tests/control-center-ai-setup.test.js tests/control-center-goal-completion.test.js tests/control-center-media-review.test.js tests/dashboard-settings-store.test.js tests/media-review-contracts.test.js tests/media-prepared-audio.test.js tests/playwright-test.test.js
scripts.test:browser: npm run control-center:build && npm run test:browser:run
scripts.release:check: npm test && npm run control-center:build && npm run test:rename-readiness && npm run test:pack && npm run test:pack-install
